description: Implement the inventory and equipment management screen. A modal overlay where the player can view all carried items, equip/unequip gear, inspect item stats, and drop items. Must be usable mid-run via a hotkey.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing 'I' or 'Tab' toggles the inventory screen as a modal overlay on top of the game viewport.
The inventory displays all carried items as icons in a grid, with the current equipment loadout shown alongside.
Hovering or selecting an item shows a tooltip with: item name, slot type, stats (damage, armor, durability, power draw), and a one-line description.
The player can equip an item by selecting it and choosing 'equip' — the item moves to the matching slot and any previously equipped item returns to inventory.
The player can drop an item, which removes it from inventory and places it on the current tile.
Inventory has a hard cap of 8 slots (expandable via backpack equipment).
The game is paused (no turns process) while the inventory screen is open.
spec_section: 5.2 Modular Equipment System, 5.5 Resource Management (Inventory Space)
notes: Spec: 'Inventory Space — Hard cap, must make tradeoffs.' Keep the UI clean and keyboard-navigable. Render as a Canvas overlay, not an HTML element.
